query: How frequently in 2026 has Russia launched overnight drone barrages against Ukraine exceeding 600 drones in a single night? List specific dates and drone counts for the largest barrages in May, June, and early July 2026 according to Ukrainian Air Force figures.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**Russian overnight drone barrages against Ukraine exceeding 600 drones (May–early July 2026, per Ukrainian Air Force figures): 3 confirmed instances**

| Date | Drones | Combined total | Notes |
|------|--------|----------------|-------|
| **May 13–14, 2026** | **675 drones** | 731 (incl. 56 missiles) | Ukraine neutralized 693; primary target Kyiv |
| **June 1–2, 2026** | **656 drones** | 729 (incl. 73 missiles) | 602 drones + 40 missiles downed; 11–13 killed, Dnipro building collapse |
| **June 14–15, 2026** | **611 drones** | 681 (incl. 70 missiles) | 632 targets intercepted; Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra cathedral set ablaze |

**Early July 2026: none exceeded 600.** Attacks in late June/early July were far smaller (June 28: 142; June 30: 154; June 30–July 1: 151 drones).

**Critical caveat I flagged:** The prominent 660-drone (June 25–26), 992/555-drone (June 17–18), and 556-drone (May 17) figures circulating in this window were **Ukrainian attacks ON Russia** (per Russian MoD) — the opposite direction — and are correctly excluded from this count.

**Context:** Russia fired a record 8,150 long-range drones at Ukraine in May 2026 (+24% vs. April), with Ukraine intercepting ~91%. All findings and structured data (key facts, 11 sources, 13 quantitative data points) have been submitted.

sources.snippet: June 15, 2026: 70 missiles and 611 drones (681 total) at Kyiv, Kharkiv, Dnipro; Lavra Dormition Cathedral fire.
